items.statusDetails:

    1) <nav aria-label="Appearance" class="vector-appearance-landmark">…</nav> aka GetByRole(AriaRole.Navigation, new() { Name = "Personal tools" }).Locator("nav")
    2) <input role="button" type="checkbox" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Appearance" class="vector-dropdown-checkbox " id="vector-appearance-dropdown-checkbox" data-event-name="ui.dropdown-vector-appearance-dropdown"/> aka Locator("#vector-appearance-dropdown-checkbox")
    3) <nav aria-label="Appearance" class="vector-appearance-landmark">…</nav> aka GetByRole(AriaRole.Navigation, new() { Name = "Appearance" })
